steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: The blank verb needs to agree with its subject: “her book's musings on tenth-century Japanese courtly life.” The head noun “musings” is plural.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A plural subject requires a plural verb form. Choice B (“fascinate”) is the plural form; the other three are singular verbs. That matches choice B — B is correct.
